controls.name: User training and phishing simulation program
Email filtering with attachment sandboxing and link rewriting
Block macros from internet-sourced documents
Application control to prevent execution of untrusted payloads
Show file extensions and warn on executable content
PowerShell Constrained Language Mode and script block logging
Execution prevention for unsigned scripts (WDAC/AppLocker)
Disable or restrict legacy script engines where not required
Restrict WMI remote access to administrative subnets
Privileged account management for remote execution rights
Egress filtering with TLS/HTTP inspection at the perimeter
Network intrusion prevention with C2 signature coverage
Block download of executable content from uncategorised domains
Network intrusion prevention on ingress tool transfer signatures
Alert on discovery command chains (whoami, net, nltest) from user context
Rate-limit and monitor LDAP queries; alert on bulk enumeration
Harden Active Directory read permissions for standard users
Monitor group enumeration volume from workstations
Internal network segmentation to limit scan reach
Host firewalls denying unsolicited internal management ports
Endpoint behaviour prevention for injection primitives (CreateRemoteThread)
Attack surface reduction rules blocking cross-process injection
Set UAC to Always Notify and deny silent elevation paths
Remove local administrator rights from standard users
Monitor ms-settings and other UAC-bypass registry keys
Alert on system binary names executing from non-standard paths
Require code signing for executables in user-writable paths
Endpoint memory-scanning / AMSI integration for reflective loads
Alert on processes loading the CLR without associated .NET images on disk
Long, random passwords (25+ chars) or gMSA for all SPN accounts
Disable RC4 for Kerberos; enforce AES service tickets
Alert on RC4 (0x17) TGS requests and Kerberoasting volume
Enable Credential Guard and LSASS RunAsPPL on all hosts
Tiered administration so DC credentials never touch lower tiers
Alert on handles to lsass.exe with VM_READ from non-system processes
Multi-factor authentication for all remote and privileged access
Anomalous logon detection (new source host, impossible travel)
Network segmentation; block workstation-to-workstation SMB/RDP/WinRM
Disable ADMIN$ remote execution paths where not operationally required
Multi-factor authentication for remote sessions
Double KRBTGT reset after credential exposure; short ticket lifetimes
Detect Kerberos logons for accounts absent from the preceding auth chain
Block lateral file staging to ADMIN$/C$ shares from non-admin hosts
Alert on transient service installs (PSEXESVC and random-name binaries)
Restrict service creation rights to dedicated administrative accounts
Audit scheduled-task creation; alert on tasks registered by SYSTEM outside change windows
Restrict task creation via GPO to administrative accounts
Monitor Run/RunOnce key writes and autostart changes
Application control preventing autostart of unsigned binaries
Alert on Event ID 7045 service installs referencing user-writable paths
Require signed binaries for service images
Alert on account creation (EID 4720) on domain controllers and servers
Multi-party approval workflow for privileged account creation
Monitor SPN registrations and directory permission changes
Harden AD ACLs; review AdminSDHolder and delegation regularly
Egress volume anomaly detection per host and destination
Block direct-to-IP outbound traffic from user segments
